guess I should write down the questions I had today so that in a year I can be like, hey, now we have answers.
Okay.
All right.
Well, that's Well, so nice meeting you.
I'm super excited.
I'll enter you to Kyle, but like, that's more of a like for you rather than like for us being like, hey, you need to pass this other interview.
And so when can you start, you know, and let's go from there, you know?
Yeah.
Yeah.
I can just tell you Curtis, Curtis, I want to keep all these good relationships and I want to be the alum for everywhere I've ever been two weeks is what I would want.
And again, you said, when you first reach out, like, I'm sure you're happy and I am.
It's almost like that's why you want happy people is because it's like it's not a bad, I'm not in a bad, I'm thriving.
So it's just like, I just love to throw fuel on the fire.
would love to, you know, jump in and help you figure things out as you grow.
Okay.
Okay, let me think for an hour and I'll send you a number.
I'll be here.
And if you want to text me too, feel free to send you my number.
In case like email, I'll probably won't get to it for until the end of the day.
But like, it's usually less plus clutter, you know.
Yeah.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to discuss potential role for Bethany at GrowthX (Marcel's company).](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a rapidly growing AI-powered content marketing company, recently raising $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [They're urgently hiring for managing editor/strategist roles to handle increasing client demand](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Bethany has relevant experience from Animalz and Verblio, seeking a client-facing strategic role](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Marcel expressed strong interest in hiring Bethany, willing to make an offer quickly](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Background and Growth

  - [Recently raised $12M Series A from tier one investor](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Currently at $5.3M ARR, 67% win rate, $150k average deal size](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Goal to hit $20M this year, then $60M and $120M in following years](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Hiring aggressively - 25 engineers, 12+ managing editors needed](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### GrowthX Product/Service Offering

  - [AI-powered content marketing engine with human experts in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Workflows for research, strategy, content creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Clients seeking full-service solution (strategy, tools, execution) vs. just tools or agency services](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Role Discussion

  - [Managing Editor/Pod Lead role:](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [Client-facing (3-5 accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [Strategic input on product/workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Potential for upselling and revenue sharing bonus structure](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Compensation range mentioned: $5-8k/month, but flexible for US-based hires](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Fast-paced environment, opportunity for quick growth and impact](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)

### Bethany's Background and Interests

  - [Experience at Animalz and currently at Verblio in fintech writing](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Seeking more client-facing, strategic role vs. pure production](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Interested in AI's impact on content creation](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Values client interaction, strategy, and mentoring/managing others](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)

### Company Culture

  - [Marcel emphasizes building a non-toxic, supportive environment](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [Focus on vision, ambition, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
  - [Hiring for "builders" who want to help grow the company](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bethany to consider compensation expectations and email/text Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Marcel to introduce Bethany to Kyle (Managing Director) for further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Potential for quick offer if mutual interest confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/W7NztNNf6MkwHNdGyfrMR1J4FX-7oSc3?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
